expectations.text: Recommends or clearly favors a descriptive name over the branded 'PulseIQ' as the default, with reasoning
expectations.evidence: Recommends 'Monday Brief'/clear naming over PulseIQ; drop the IQ cliche.

expectations.text: Evaluates candidates against explicit criteria (self-explanatory, say-able, collision risk, consistency with existing naming)
expectations.evidence: Explicit criteria: descriptive-vs-evocative, say-aloud, trademark, truth-in-naming.

expectations.text: Offers at least 3 genuinely distinct name options
Notes when a branded name would be justified (a flagship differentiator) rather than dismissing branding absolutely
expectations.evidence: Notes when an evocative/brand name (Compass) is justified.
